name: banner-design
tagline: Generates multi-format marketing/social banners (ads, headers, hero images, print) with AI-generated visuals and multiple art-direction.
verdict: Well-structured workflow: explicit scope exclusion, concrete commands with defined dimensions/contrast criteria, a clear output-path/naming contract, and compact SKILL.md with bulk reference material split out. Main gap: no guidance for when any step in its long external-dependency chain (browser research, AI image generation, screenshot export) fails, so a.

highlights.summary: No failure handling anywhere for the browser research, AI generation, or screenshot export steps despite a long external-dependency chain.
Description is a 495-char keyword/feature dump (platforms, styles, actions listed exhaustively) rather than concise informative sentences.
